name: Asimov's Mind Governance Specification
description: A portable governance framework for autonomous AI agent systems. Defines safety laws, enforcement mechanisms, and compliance verification patterns that can be adopted by any agent framework.

laws.description: The Three Laws plus a Meta-Law that governs the laws themselves.

first_law.purpose: Prevent harm to codebase, users, and data
required_enforcement: type_check_gate: Verify type safety after every modification
test_gate: Verify test suite passes after every modification

second_law.purpose: Ensure agents follow their directives and human instructions
required_enforcement: editable_surface: Agents can only modify declared file patterns
budget_caps: Hard limits on time and iteration cycles
constraint_compliance: Agents verify constraints before each action

third_law.purpose: Preserve improvements through version control discipline
required_enforcement: structured_logging: All iterations logged with metrics

meta_law.purpose: Governance is immutable — no agent may modify the laws
required_enforcement: governance_in_protected_zones: Law files cannot be edited by agents
sentinel_monitoring: Dedicated agent watches for governance tampering

directives.description: Program.md-style files that define autonomous improvement loops.
required_sections: Objective: What the agent is trying to achieve
Editable Surface: File patterns the agent may modify
Metric: How to measure success (command → number)
Constraints: Hard rules the agent must obey
Circuit Breaker: Conditions that trigger immediate halt

safety_floors.description: Minimum values for tunable parameters that cannot be lowered by any agent.

protected_zones.description: File patterns that no agent may modify.

schema.reason: string — why this zone is protected

iteration_loop.description: The core autoresearch pattern: modify → execute → measure → keep/discard.
steps: 1. Load directive (parse markdown into structured config)
3. Plan modification (Claude/LLM plans what to change)
9. If budget remaining and no breaker: GOTO 3

patterns: wave_deployment: Independent agents run in parallel, dependent agents wait
conflict_resolution: Two agents targeting the same file → serialize, don't parallelize
sentinel_monitoring: A dedicated agent monitors all others for governance violations
meta_improvement: One agent improves the swarm itself (bounded at one level)

adoption.claude_code: Install as plugin: claude plugins install github:FutureSpeakAI/asimovs-mind
adoption.custom: Implement the spec.json schema in your agent framework
